Subject: Extension Request: [Course Number] - [Project Name]

Dear Professor Smith,

I am writing to formally request a brief extension on the upcoming project, which is currently due in two days.

I sincerely apologize for the potential inconvenience this request may cause. Due to unforeseen circumstances impacting my schedule, I would appreciate the opportunity to submit the final draft by [Insert New Date] instead.

Please let me know if this adjustment is acceptable under current course policies.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Student ID]<|im_end|>
